title: BlatTweaks
description: A modular plugin that adds mechanics
body:
# Requires BlatLibs 0.3.2+


A plugin that adds modular mechanics.

## Custom fishing.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ZaNFjD3HcT8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Stamina placeholders:
%stamina_stamina% - player stamina
%stamina_stamina_max% - player stamina maximum
%stamina_jump_depletion% - player jump depletion
%stamina_recover_rate% - player recover rate
%stamina_tire_rate% - player tire rate
Info
You can write your ideas in the comments and, subject to the quality of the idea, I will add them, and you to the list of authors of ideas.


### The authors of the ideas:
- BlatFan
